text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: —I've been entrusted with an important job.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A collaboration event between a certain famous sports brand and Tracen Academy. There, the academy's Horsegirls are supposed to introduce their new products, but—

text_block_list.name: Espoir City
text_block_list.text: Hmm～ So this is that latest giant tire for pulling, huh.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Word is it has 108 new features. Really makes my inner gadget geek tingle～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My role is to instruct the Horsegirls participating in the event. I wonder how we should go about promoting the new products…
choice_data_list: (I wonder if I can do this right…)
(I wonder if I can do this right…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It'll be okay. I'm sure you can do it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wanting to entertain everyone, wanting them to understand how good the product is… Your earnest feelings will definitely get across.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So, just like during that diet… 
Let's do our best together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we all gathered in front of the giant new tire sitting in a corner of the track.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Whatever the case, let's have everyone share their ideas first. I'll take notes!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: We absolutely have to show off its main attraction, the transformation feature.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Hmm, hmm. According to the manual, the lightest is 『Water Flea Mode』 and the heaviest is 『Mammoth Mode』

text_block_list.name: Espoir City
text_block_list.text: It's a training tool, so we gotta at least show us using it first, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah! Then I'll try pulling it once for now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Led by the proactive Buena Vista, everyone worked together and preparations progressed smoothly—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Our promotional points are really coming together. Hehe, I'm looking forward to the actual day.
choice_data_list: Sorry for not being much help
Sorry for not being much help

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: No, no! That's not true at all.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Watching you… Your feelings get conveyed to me. The feeling of wanting to do your best.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm getting a share of your energy that way. If anything, I should be the one thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista always sympathizes with my feelings so deeply… And finally, the day of the event arrived.

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: (Chatter, chatter… Murmur, murmur…)

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Oh boy, it's a bigger crowd than I expected. Talk about a heavy responsibility…

text_block_list.name: Espoir City
text_block_list.text: Heh! L-Like hell I'd get scared over somethin' like this! Let's get this over with quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …I can feel everyone's nervousness. I feel it too. But… Buena Vista is right beside me—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I-I'm… Okay! If we do it just like the rehearsal, I'm sure…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: E-Everyone who gathered to see the new training tire…! T-Then… L-Let's begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …Come to think of it, Buena Vista has always empathized with my feelings. Treating every little thing as if it were her own—
choice_data_list: <size=32>Don't tell me… My nervousness rubbed off on her…!?</size>
<size=32>Don't tell me… My nervousness rubbed off on her…!?</size>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: F-First, we launch the dedicated control app… Um… Err…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: H… Here!

text_block_list.name: New High-Tech Tire
text_block_list.text: (Whirrr! Claaang!)

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Whoa!? Buena, that's the switch for Underwater Navigation Mode!

text_block_list.name: New High-Tech Tire
text_block_list.text: …DESTROY…!

text_block_list.name: Espoir City
text_block_list.text: That's the switch for Berserker Mode!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Umm… Emergency Stop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …Despite some rather dangerous moments, we somehow managed to proceed with the program—

text_block_list.name: Returning Audience
text_block_list.text:
『Hmm… That wasn't half bad, right?』 
『I guess I'll… Buy it…』 
『I thought the school building was going to be destroyed…』

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: —Good work out there, everyone.
choice_data_list: I-I'm sorry… For messing it up…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I'm sorry. If only I hadn't gotten so nervous—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: It's alright! It was well-received overall, and the client was satisfied…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I should be glad we just 
managed to pull it off… Still, if there's a next time, I'll have to try harder.
